name: Stormbreak Coast
travelFeel: Wind-battered shores, humid jungle paths, and unstable stone ridges.
summary: A fractured coastal region where wreckage, old magic, and opportunistic raiders create constant tension.

hexes.label: Hex 1
hexes.discovery: A broken cargo chest with waterlogged charts
hexes.hook: One chart references an inland shrine marked with a warning sigil.

hexes.label: Hex 2
hexes.discovery: Fresh bootprints vanishing into heavy brush
hexes.hook: A cautious party can shadow the tracks to a hidden camp.

hexes.label: Hex 3
hexes.occupants: A scavenger lookout with trained glider lizards
hexes.discovery: Signal mirrors pointed toward the sea
hexes.hook: The lookout can reveal which wrecks were deliberately lured ashore.

hexes.label: Hex 4
hexes.discovery: A half-sunken skiff carrying ceremonial masks
hexes.hook: The masks belong to a nearby island culture and were not meant to be here.

hexes.label: Hex 5
hexes.occupants: Storm-touched guardians bound to old wardstones
hexes.discovery: A cracked shrine with a sealed lower chamber
hexes.hook: The chamber contains a map fragment tied to another region.

hexes.label: Hex 6
hexes.discovery: A freshwater pool under luminous vines
hexes.hook: The hermit knows why imperial scouts are really here.

hexes.label: Hex 7
hexes.discovery: Survey stakes hammered into ancient stone
hexes.hook: Their maps imply a planned claim over the whole island chain.
